strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded
Current role involves AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching AI agent requirement
Strong TypeScript/Node.js background with React and MongoDB exposure
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java experience is dated (robotic arms work pre-2018)
Cloud platform experience appears limited to AWS CDK; no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth shown beyond GISCollective

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP infrastructure work
Missing Nest.js and limited recent Java/Kotlin

response.justification: Candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with deep full-stack expertise in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and directly relevant current work on AI agents and MCP frameworks, which aligns strongly with the role's AI agent development requirement. Gaps in Nest.js and recent Kotlin/Java are real but learnable given the demonstrated polyglot background (DLang, Java, C++, Swift). Strong testing/TDD culture and architecture experience round out a solid fit.
